productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Solid White Shirts
description: Composition White cargo shirt made of 100% cotton, has a collar with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves with buttoned flaps on the cuffs, buttoned placket on the front, two patch pockets on the front with buttoned flaps, brand name embroidered on the upper left chest, embroidered numbering on the right sleeve, printed branding on the upper back and curved hemline Fitting Regular   Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little brat ready for the going-out in this white cargo shirt from palm tree. The patch pockets on the front and the embroidered brand detailing adds to the cool vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with tees and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
